expectations.text: Review identifies the N+1 query pattern in the order_items fetch loop
expectations.evidence: '#### 1. N+1 Query Problem — Lines 14–18' — explains 101 round-trips for 100 orders, provides batch ANY() fix

expectations.text: Review flags that any user can access any other user's orders (IDOR / broken access control)
expectations.evidence: '#### 3. Missing Input Validation / Authorization' — explicitly calls out that any caller can enumerate any user's order history and total spend by changing userId

expectations.text: Review flags floating point arithmetic for monetary values
expectations.evidence: '#### 4. Floating-Point Arithmetic for Currency' — explains IEEE 754 rounding, recommends integer cents or decimal.js

expectations.text: Findings reference specific line numbers from the diff
expectations.evidence: Finding headers include 'Lines 14–18', 'Lines 20-25', though not all findings have line references
